name: OnchainReceipt
description: An on-chain transfer to a campaign contribution address. Created by the receipt-watcher processor and reconciled to a pledge.

global.schema:
type OnchainReceiptState {
    chainId: Int
    txHash: String
    blockNumber: Int
    blockTimestamp: DateTime
    fromAddress: EthereumAddress
    toAddress: EthereumAddress
    asset: ReceiptAsset
    amount: Amount_Tokens
    ethEquivalentAmount: Amount_Tokens
    ethPriceUsdAtReceipt: Float
    matchedPledgeId: PHID
    reconciliationStatus: ReconciliationStatus!
    rawLog: String
}

enum ReconciliationStatus {
    UNMATCHED
    MATCHED
    AMBIGUOUS
    MANUALLY_OVERRIDDEN
    REORGED
}

type ReceiptAsset {
    symbol: String!
    contractAddress: EthereumAddress
}
global.initialValue:
{
  "chainId": null,
  "txHash": null,
  "blockNumber": null,
  "blockTimestamp": null,
  "fromAddress": null,
  "toAddress": null,
  "asset": null,
  "amount": null,
  "ethEquivalentAmount": null,
  "ethPriceUsdAtReceipt": null,
  "matchedPledgeId": null,
  "reconciliationStatus": "UNMATCHED",
  "rawLog": null
}

operations.name: RECORD_RECEIPT
operations.description: Record an on-chain transfer to a campaign address
operations.schema:
input ReceiptAssetInput {
    symbol: String!
    contractAddress: EthereumAddress
}

input RecordReceiptInput {
    chainId: Int!
    txHash: String!
    blockNumber: Int!
    blockTimestamp: DateTime!
    fromAddress: EthereumAddress!
    toAddress: EthereumAddress!
    asset: ReceiptAssetInput!
    amount: Amount_Tokens!
    ethEquivalentAmount: Amount_Tokens!
    ethPriceUsdAtReceipt: Float!
    rawLog: String
}
operations.template: Record an on-chain transfer to a campaign address

errors.name: ReceiptAlreadyRecordedError
errors.description: RECORD_RECEIPT has already been called on this document

operations.name: ATTACH_PLEDGE
operations.description: Mark this receipt as fulfilling a specific pledge
operations.template: Mark this receipt as fulfilling a specific pledge

operations.name: MARK_AMBIGUOUS
operations.description: Multiple candidate pledges — needs manual override
operations.template: Multiple candidate pledges — needs manual override

operations.name: OVERRIDE_MATCH
operations.description: Manually attach this receipt to a pledge (operator override)
operations.template: Manually attach this receipt to a pledge (operator override)

operations.name: CLEAR_MATCH
operations.description: Clear any matched pledge and reset to UNMATCHED
operations.template: Clear any matched pledge and reset to UNMATCHED

operations.name: MARK_REORGED
operations.description: Mark this receipt as reorged out of the canonical chain. Excluded from totals.
operations.template: Mark this receipt as reorged out of the canonical chain

changeLog: Add ethEquivalentAmount + ethPriceUsdAtReceipt for ETH-denominated rollups
Add MARK_REORGED action + REORGED reconciliation status
